title: lanpard Faraday Pouch for car Keys,2 Pack Faraday Bag | Car Key Signal Blocking Pouch | Keyless Entry Car Keys Case | RFID Blocker Bag for Car Security | Anti-Theft Remote Entry Keyless Protect(M)
features: 【SECURE YOUR CAR BEFORE IT'S TOO LATE】 - Simply place your car key into the Lanpard double-layer signal-blocking Faraday bag to thwart theft. Prevent thieves from amplifying your fob's signal and accessing your vehicle. This essential anti-theft device is perfect for enhancing vehicle security.

【RFID PROTECTION FUNCTION】 - The Lanpard Faraday bag fob features premium carbon fibre textured material and dual layers of shielding, effectively blocking signals such as phone calls, SMS, Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, 5G, and NFC. Suitable for all key fob sizes, it ensures no response from your car when keys are inside. It's an essential for protecting both your car and credit cards.

【LARGER HOOK & KEYRING ADDED】 - The Lanpard Faraday Bag features a larger U-shaped zinc alloy hook, ideal for organising house keys, AirTags, or small tools like multitools, keeping them easily accessible. The internal key ring ensures that retrieving your car key is effortless. These features make our Faraday Bag a top choice for vehicle protection and convenience.

【PORTABILITY & DOUBLE SET】 - Measuring 9x14 cm, this compact car key signal-blocking pouch is easy to carry. We offer a double set, allowing protection for spare key fobs or multiple vehicles. It's ideal for anyone needing secure key protection, perfectly suiting anti-theft needs.

【LIFETIME WARRANTY & SECURITY】 - Protect your vehicle with the Lanpard Faraday Bag, designed to block hacking and unauthorised access. Enjoy peace of mind with our lifetime warranty and full refund guarantee if unsatisfied. This set offers enhanced security, making it a wise choice for any vehicle.
